channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Motorola's $1,499 Razr Ultra 2026 is the perfect example of why we don't need new phones every year
item.description: Motorola's $1,499 Razr Ultra 2026 is a microcosm of broader industry problems, but there had to be a better way to handle them.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Plus 2026 cover screen
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Plus 2026 cover screen
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Plus 2026 cover screen

item.title: Motorola's Razr Fold finally has a price: It's cheaper than the Galaxy Z Fold 7
item.description: Motorola's first book-style foldable will be available for pre-order starting May 14.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:text: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:title: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.

item.title: Motorola’s new Razr turns Google Photos into a stylist and a memory hub
item.description: Google Photos is turning into a smart closet and daily feed on Motorola phones, mixing outfits and memories for convenience.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr 2026 display with an image of someone lounging on a chair
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr 2026 display with an image of someone lounging on a chair
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr 2026 display with an image of someone lounging on a chair

item.title: The Moto Buds 2 Plus pack Bose audio and AI smarts into a $150 package
item.description: Motorola’s $150 Moto Buds 2 Plus pack Bose-tuned sound, dual drivers, ANC, and AI features.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: blue Moto Buds 2 Plus case and earbuds
media:content.media:text: blue Moto Buds 2 Plus case and earbuds
media:content.media:title: blue Moto Buds 2 Plus case and earbuds

item.title: Hello, iconic: the Moto Razr 2026 series rocks the same great look, but levels up to bold new heights
item.description: Motorola's newest Razr 2026 series is here, and it's going big and bold, striving for iconic with camera-enhanced AI features, sharp upgrades, and more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Two people holding the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 in its two available colors
media:content.media:text: Two people holding the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 in its two available colors
media:content.media:title: Two people holding the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 in its two available colors

item.title: I went hands-on with the Motorola Razr 2026 series and I have some very mixed feelings, but there's one model that definitely stands out
item.description: Motorola's new Razr 2026 series offers some refinements compared to the Razr 2025 devices, but the lack of changes may not be enough when prices are going up.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026, Razr Plus 2026, and Razr 2026
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026, Razr Plus 2026, and Razr 2026
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026, Razr Plus 2026, and Razr 2026

item.title: Unlock the hidden potential of your Nothing Phone 4a Pro with these 4 Essential tips and tricks
item.description: Just got a Nothing Phone 4a Pro? We've got some tips and tricks that'll help you make the best out of your new phone!
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A leveler Glyph Toy on the Glyph Matrix display on the back of a silver Nothing Phone 4a Pro
media:content.media:text: A leveler Glyph Toy on the Glyph Matrix display on the back of a silver Nothing Phone 4a Pro
media:content.media:title: A leveler Glyph Toy on the Glyph Matrix display on the back of a silver Nothing Phone 4a Pro

item.title: Xiaomi's next flagship killer could get more expensive, and that stings
item.description: Xiaomi's next T series might arrive earlier with stronger specs, but rising prices push it closer to true flagship territory, making it less of a bargain than before.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Xiaomi 15T Pro review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Xiaomi 15T Pro review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Xiaomi 15T Pro review on Android Central

item.title: The app Splitwise is the best hack to split group trip expenses in 2026
item.description: Going on a group vacation or planning something with several individuals sharing the costs? Splitwise is an easy way to track and split those expenses.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Splitwise app
media:content.media:text: Splitwise app
media:content.media:title: Splitwise app

item.title: Now, Gemini might get proactive with timely, personalized 'suggestions'
item.description: Another rumor says Gemini's "proactive" features in development might lean on Personal Intelligence, your notifications, and more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Google Gemini app
media:content.media:text: The Google Gemini app
media:content.media:title: The Google Gemini app

item.title: I've tested many of the world's best e-readers — and a few of them are heavily discounted at Amazon right now
item.description: Whether you're shopping for Mother's Day gift or simply tackling those 2026 reading goals, these e-reader deals deserve your attention.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Kobo Libra Colour review
media:content.media:text: Kobo Libra Colour review
media:content.media:title: Kobo Libra Colour review

item.title: Google Translate turns 20, and it's making me practice my speech with AI
item.description: Google celebrated its 20th anniversary of the Translate app, but this birthday bash gave users the gift of Pronunciation Practice.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Translate's 20th anniversary adds pronunciation practice for users looking to take their language skills to another level.
media:content.media:text: Google Translate's 20th anniversary adds pronunciation practice for users looking to take their language skills to another level.
media:content.media:title: Google Translate's 20th anniversary adds pronunciation practice for users looking to take their language skills to another level.

item.title: AirDrop sharing appears to be expanding beyond Pixel and Galaxy phones
item.description: AirDrop to Quick Share is no longer limited to Pixel and Galaxy devices.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26 series AirDrop

media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26 series AirDrop

item.title: The Galaxy S27 could get a radical redesign to make room for Qi2 magnets
item.description: Samsung may move Galaxy S27 cameras to enable Qi2 magnetic charging, though higher costs could still kill the redesign.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Lawsuit hits Amazon, claims Fire TV Sticks intentionally give out when support runs dry
item.description: Amazon was hit with a lawsuit, claiming the company had a hand in the sudden drop in functionality of its early Fire TV Sticks.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Amazon logo gray background
media:content.media:text: Amazon logo gray background
media:content.media:title: Amazon logo gray background

item.title: Google warns phone actions are getting cut from its smart home automations very soon
item.description: Nest users will wave goodbye to phone actions in Google's smart home automations, as a representative confirmed as much online.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Creating automations in the Google Home app in 2024

item.title: Smartphone sales are down, but Fairphone is having a breakout year
item.description: Fairphone is crushing a shrinking phone market with 116% growth, proving repairable, long-lasting devices can win.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Importing a Chinese Phone? Here are six things you need to know
item.description: Want the latest camera flagship but don't want to shell out close to $2,000? You should consider getting the Chinese model of the phone instead.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)

media:content.media:description: Vivo X300 Ultra review on Android Central

item.title: Forget the 2026 models: T-Mobile will give you last year's Motorola Razr Ultra for FREE with new line
item.description: Add a line with an eligible unlimited plan and T-Mobile will give you our favorite flip phone of 2025 for FREE, no trade-in required.

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy Glasses leak is a direct shot at Meta Ray-Ban's crown
item.description: Samsung’s Galaxy Glasses leak reveals two models, giving users choice, but it also feels like Samsung is cautiously testing what actually sticks.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Samsung’s Fold 8 Wide could fix one of foldables’ ugliest camera problems
item.description: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Fold 8 Wide may get a smaller selfie cutout for a cleaner look, but with the same 10MP camera, it’s more of a minor tweak than a real upgrade.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 review
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 review
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 review

item.title: Spotify drives engagement the right way, expands into 'Fitness' with Peloton
item.description: Spotify wants to do it too, expanding into fitness, giving users Peloton workouts in a new partnership and classes from established creators.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Spotify announces an expansion into Fitness, bringing a Peloton partnership and more to help users manage their wellbeing.
media:content.media:text: Spotify announces an expansion into Fitness, bringing a Peloton partnership and more to help users manage their wellbeing.
media:content.media:title: Spotify announces an expansion into Fitness, bringing a Peloton partnership and more to help users manage their wellbeing.

item.title: Google just announced a cleaner Nest and Fitbit community, but there's a catch
item.description: Google is revamping its Home, Nest, and Fitbit forums with a faster design and Gemini features, but it’s wiping all posts and forcing some users to start over.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Fitbit logo
media:content.media:text: Fitbit logo

item.title: Gmail, Drive, and other Google apps are getting a major icon redesign

item.title: Google's Nest Hub has no clue what time it is, and it's messing with our heads
item.description: A Nest Hub user reported a strange issue, as their device finds it difficult to tell the time correctly.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Honor Connect, photography updates carry the Magic 8 Pro's huge April patch

item.title: The Moto G Power (2025) is a solid budget phone with a few surprises — and it's FREE at Straight Talk Wireless

item.title: Nothing's Essential Voice redefined how I talk to my phone, and it's about time someone fixed this problem

item.title: YouTube on mobile makes livestream ads way less annoying, but there's a caveat
item.description: YouTube now keeps livestreams visible during ads, but mutes the audio — so you won’t miss the action, just everything you’re supposed to hear.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Verizon brings back bundle deal that gets you a free Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus, Galaxy Watch 8, AND $100 gift card - so what's the catch?
item.description: Verizon is bringing back a deal that will give you a free smartwatch or tablet when you purchase an eligible smartphone. Oh, and there's a gift card up for grabs too.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 vs. Galaxy Z Fold 7: Worth waiting for?
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 should arrive in late July and the leaks so far aren't painting the most exciting picture. Will it be worth the upgrade over the Galaxy Z Fold 7?

item.title: One bankruptcy just wiped out a popular Google TV lineup in Europe
item.description: Thomson’s European Google TV maker went bankrupt owing €36 million, so don't hold your breath for that new streaming box.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: I finally got a handle on my expenses thanks to this AI feature on the Find X9 Ultra

item.title: One Meta Quest game is reviving my love for multiplayer gaming
item.description: Forefront is Battlefield on steroids, putting gamers in 32-player matches with giant maps, vehicles, classes, tons of weapons, and more, all in glorious VR.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:credit: Original screenshot: Triangle Factory, edits: Nicholas Sutrich
media:content.media:description: Me riding a jetski in Forefront while wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset
media:content.media:text: Me riding a jetski in Forefront while wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset
media:content.media:title: Me riding a jetski in Forefront while wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset
